vectorizer.name: Image-to-Vector EPS/SVG Converter
vectorizer.description: Translates raster images to resolution-independent vector shapes using Moore-Neighbor contours, Laplacian smoothing, and RDP path reduction.

colorCount.purpose: Number of color layers extracted by K-Means++ clustering

laplacianSmooth.purpose: Number of vertex coordinate averaging iterations to eliminate jagged stairs

noiseThreshold.purpose: Minimum pixel area cluster size to filter small noise components

webp_optimizer.name: WebP Image Compressor
webp_optimizer.description: Optimizes raster assets client-side in the browser using custom HTML5 Canvas export bindings.

kannada_transliteration.name: Phonetic Kannada Transliteration Engine
kannada_transliteration.description: Translates English character input to Kannada Unicode characters in real-time, matching typed strings against a heritage dictionary and displaying 3 phonetic alternate spelling options.

dictionary_size.purpose: Number of custom cultural word-mappings parsed by the override dictionary

suggestion_count.purpose: Number of alternate spelling suggestions generated for the active word
